fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the repair status.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the repair status.

fields.name: Service Order Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service order status that is linked to this repair status.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority of the service order status.

fields.name: Initial
fields.tooltip: Specifies that no service has been performed.

fields.name: Partly Serviced
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the service item has been partly serviced. Further work is needed.

fields.name: In Process
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the service of the item is in process.

fields.name: Finished
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the service of the item has been finished.

fields.name: Referred
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the service of the item has been referred to another resource. No service has been performed on the service item.

fields.name: Spare Part Ordered
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a spare part has been ordered for the service item.

fields.name: Spare Part Received
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a spare part has been received for the service item.

fields.name: Waiting for Customer
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you are waiting for a customer response.

fields.name: Quote Finished
fields.tooltip: Specifies that quoting work on the service item is finished.

fields.name: Posting Allowed
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you can post a service order, if it includes a service item with this repair status.

fields.name: Pending Status Allowed
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you can manually change the Status of a service order to Pending, if it includes a service item with this repair status.

fields.name: In Process Status Allowed
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you can manually change the Status of a service order to In Process, if it includes a service item with this repair status.

fields.name: Finished Status Allowed
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you can manually change the Status of a service order to Finished, if it includes a service item with this repair status.

fields.name: On Hold Status Allowed
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you can manually change the Status of a service order to On Hold, if it includes a service item with this repair status.
